Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3
In this training, Dean is going to show you the step‐by‐step framework on how to get an expert to say yes when you approach them to be a Knowledge
Broker. Will people have questions, yes. Will people have push back, yes. But with this training, Dean is going to show you how to overcome all of that
to get a yes!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Remember to finish the conversation your ideal expert is having in their own minds. Put yourself in their shoes so you can best know how
to communicate with them.
Ask them what their biggest resistance would be to putting on a small group, workshop or mastermind.
Know that the deal should be 50% for expert and 50% for Knowledge Broker of all profit.
Help make it seem as simple as possible for the expert you want to work with.
The expert must agree to use their own following to fill the event. ﴾social media, email list, phone list, etc﴿
